summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Webbook Generator 3.0 after UI/UX overhaul. All core features working correctly - Google Auth via Emergent, protected routes, pricing display ($25 one-time), dark theme, responsive design. Backend APIs 100% passing (23/23 tests). Minor fix applied: changed Polish 'Logowanie...' to English 'Signing in...' in AuthCallback.

minor.issue: Badge names and descriptions are in Polish (e.g., 'Pierwszy Krok', 'Ukończ pierwszy rozdział')
minor.impact: Low - may be intentional for Polish target audience

minor.issue: Exported HTML contains Polish text ('Ukończ rozdział', 'Ukończone')

passed_tests: Backend projects endpoints require auth (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Backend quiz endpoint returns null for non-existent
Frontend Sign In button redirects to Emergent Auth (https://auth.emergentagent.com)
Frontend pricing section displays $25 one-time payment
Frontend testimonials section with Sarah Mitchell
Frontend protected routes redirect to landing when unauthenticated (Dashboard, Builder, Preview)
Frontend gradient 'interactive' text in hero section
action_items: OPTIONAL: Translate badge names/descriptions to English if full English UI is required
OPTIONAL: Translate exported HTML webbook UI text to English
critical_code_review_comments: AuthCallback.js had Polish text 'Logowanie...' - FIXED to 'Signing in...'
Backend badges still have Polish names - may need translation if English-only UI required
Export HTML template in server.py contains Polish text for gamification UI
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data and auth protection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working: Landing page UI, Google Auth redirect to Emergent Auth, protected routes, pricing display. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Minor Polish text remains in badges and export HTML - may be intentional for Polish target audience. AuthCallback Polish text was fixed to English.

verified_features.google_login_flow: ✅ Sign In button correctly redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com with proper redirect URL
verified_features.auth_callback_handling: ✅ AuthCallback component extracts session_id from URL fragment and calls handleSessionId
verified_features.dashboard_protection: ✅ /dashboard redirects to landing when not authenticated
verified_features.builder_protection: ✅ /builder/:id redirects to landing when not authenticated
verified_features.preview_protection: ✅ /preview/:id redirects to landing when not authenticated
verified_features.pricing_display: ✅ $25 one-time payment displayed correctly, no 'free' mentions
verified_features.mobile_responsive: ✅ No horizontal overflow, proper mobile layout
